texto: I always said I acted like a twelve-year old, so I decided to write like a twelve-year old.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Terri Bertha: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “I always said I acted like a twelve-year old, so I decided to write like a twelve-year old.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, horror, twelve pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor.

frase_original: I always said I acted like a twelve-year old, so I decided to write like a twelve-year old.

texto: Spooky Twisties:All things Spooky, here beginThey lay and wait, in books within.They sometimes pass, in open space.Then leave and go, without a trace.Some appear on the spot.Some we know, others not.Sometimes we are afraid to say,“leave us now”, or beg to stay.At times they leave a sign beyond,A gentle breeze, or note from song.Be not afraid, to read story’s close.For in the dark, your spirit goes.
explicacao: Citação de Terri Bertha sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Spooky Twisties:All things Spooky, here beginThey lay and wait, in books within.They sometimes pa…” articula fe, entertaining, fun em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e fun.
